step0_architectureGuard.lessons: Pathway lessons load from DB/catalog with overlays merged at runtime via `src/lib/i18n/educational-content-overlay.ts` → `public/i18n/educational-overlays/<locale>/{lessons,questions,flashcards}.json`.
step0_architectureGuard.quizzesQuestions: Exam questions remain canonical in DB; display overlays per question id in `questions.json` (labels/rationales for presentation — grading uses canonical fields).
step0_architectureGuard.uiStrings: Compiled from `tools/i18n/source/i18n-{lang}.ts` + `tools/i18n/marketing/` → merged to `nursenest-core/public/i18n/{lang}.json` (`npm run i18n:compile`).
step0_architectureGuard.routing: Exam hubs use country-first paths (`/us`, `/canada`) and pathway segments; marketing locales may use `/{locale}/…` for non-default languages per `marketing-locale-policy.ts`.
step0_architectureGuard.blog: Blog posts in Prisma `BlogPost`; localized variants via `LocalizedBlogArticle` / blog SEO modules — not the same as lesson file overlays.
step0_architectureGuard.massTranslationBlockedUntil: Adapter layer is existing overlay merge + compile pipeline. Do not bulk-translate DB source rows; extend overlays or approved DB translation tables per `docs/i18n-architecture.md`.

supportedLocales.note: Routable marketing codes include incomplete-tier locales (hidden from switcher) — see `marketing-languages.ts`.

educationalOverlaysPresent.gapVsRequestedPaths: User-requested `data/i18n/lessons/{locale}.json` is NOT the canonical layout; use `public/i18n/educational-overlays` or add a thin adapter that re-exports — avoid duplicate trees.

seoRouting.canonicalStrategy: Per-domain canonical helpers in `src/lib/seo/`; sitemap routes under `src/app/sitemap.xml` and `sitemaps/*`.
seoRouting.hreflang: Not fully centralized in one matrix file today — `global-locale-matrix.json` + future layout work should emit alternates without duplicate canonicals.
risks: Cross-locale duplicate URLs if same content is published under multiple paths without canonical discipline

paywallEntitlements.enforcement: Server-side: `resolveEntitlementForPage`, pathway access helpers, API 401 where required — locale switching must not bypass (verify on each new localized route).
paywallEntitlements.note: Re-test when adding new `[locale]` surface areas.

hardcodedEnglish.detection: Run `npm run i18n:scan` / CI from repo root per `i18n-scan.config.json`.
hardcodedEnglish.missingKeyPolicy: Non-English: `[missing:key]` style — not silent English backfill in marketing formatters (see docs).

inconsistencies: DB `content_translations` may exist for legacy paths while new work prefers overlays — coordinate before duplicating strings.
Blog vs lesson overlay locations differ by subsystem.
recommendedNextSteps: Wire `data/config/global-locale-matrix.json` into SEO hreflang + exam label helpers (incremental).
Expand educational overlays for priority locales (batched, reversible JSON commits).
Keep batch translation / MT outside runtime until human QA for clinical accuracy.
